title: TimesheetEntryRequest

employee.description: The employee the timesheet entry is for.

hours_worked.description: The number of hours logged by the employee.

start_time.description: The time at which the employee started work.

end_time.description: The time at which the employee ended work.

description:
# The Timesheet Entry Object
### Description
The `Timesheet Entry` object is used to track coverage for hours worked by an 'Employee'.


### Usage Example
GET and POST Timesheet Entries
